reviews.review_title: Can’t even get out of the tutorial
reviews.review_description: I can’t even get out of the tutorial ore grab any ammo therefore I can’t use guns or proceed in the game but by the looks of the trailer the game looks decent

I love it, fun to play when bored. Only issues are
the rocket launcher blows npcs out the map, can you add a restart level button.
ADD A SNIPER PLEASE

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment, and we're so glad you liked it!!
We'll add a restart button in the next update.
Sniper might not be available in the next update, but we can start working on it.
Your feedback is very valuable to us :)
